title: Multi-Reference VQE: Beyond Single Reference States
description: Learn how to handle strongly correlated systems using multi-reference VQE approaches that combine multiple reference determinants for accurate ground state calculations.
learningObjectives: Understand when single-reference methods fail and multi-reference is needed
Explain static vs dynamic electron correlation
Design multi-reference ansatze using multiple determinants
Implement state-averaged VQE for near-degenerate states
Apply CASSCF-inspired approaches to quantum computing
Handle bond-breaking and transition states with MR-VQE
